questionHtml: State why your answer to part (a) supports Goran’s belief.
markschemeHtml:
the variance and the mean are similar          R1

 

Note: Do not accept a general statement “the variance and the mean are equal” unless their answer in part (a) is 1.76.

 

[1 mark]
